description: Phase 32: Performance & Cost Engineering - Add SLO baselines per route, semantic LLM cache, BullMQ async work queue integration, AI cost routing, per-user cost dashboard logic, and database optimization utilities to @quant/performance.
steps: 1. Add packages/performance/src/slo-baselines.ts: Define per-route performance budgets (p50, p95, p99 latency targets, error rate budget) for each service. Include a PerformanceBudgetChecker class that validates measured metrics against budgets and returns pass/fail with details.

2. Add packages/performance/src/semantic-cache.ts: Implement a SemanticLLMCache class that caches LLM responses based on embedding similarity. Methods: get(prompt, threshold), set(prompt, embedding, response, ttl), invalidate(pattern). Use cosine similarity for matching. Include TTL-based eviction.

3. Add packages/performance/src/ai-cost-router.ts: Implement AICostRouter that routes AI requests by complexity (simple->small model, complex->large model, streaming when user-facing). Methods: routeRequest(prompt, context) returns model selection + streaming flag. Include cost estimation per request.

4. Add packages/performance/src/work-queue.ts: Create a WorkQueueManager class wrapping BullMQ patterns - defineJob(name, handler, options), enqueue(jobName, data, priority), getMetrics(). Include dead letter queue handling and per-queue rate limiting.

5. Add packages/performance/src/db-optimizer.ts: Create DatabaseOptimizer class with: slowQueryDetector(query, durationMs, threshold), indexAdvisor(queryPatterns), connectionPoolMonitor(poolStats), partitionRecommender(tableStats). Returns actionable recommendations.

6. Add packages/performance/src/cost-dashboard.ts: Create CostDashboard class that aggregates per-user cost data: computeCost(userId, timeRange), getBreakdown(userId) returning AI, storage, bandwidth, compute costs. Include tier-based cost allocation.
8. Update packages/performance/src/index.ts barrel to export all new modules.
9. Update packages/performance/package.json to add vitest test script and any needed dependencies (zod).
10. Create docs/slos.md with per-service SLO definitions and performance budgets.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm test passes for @quant/performance with all new test files
All new classes are exported from packages/performance/src/index.ts
findings: All 6 modules implemented and verified. Typecheck, test (67 tests pass), and build all succeed. Prettier reformatted files via lint-staged pre-commit hook. Added vitest and zod as dependencies to package.json.
